Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: PXL Control of a light distribution Control
PXL Control of a light distribution Control
MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG
MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: OutputControl.Start.PXL Control of a light distribution Control
ILS execute niveau sensor calibration Start
DataRead.Vehicle data record LWR developer Read
DataRead.Vehicle data set active cornering light Read
DataRead.Vehicle data set motorway light Read
DataRead.Vehicle data set extended fog light Read
DataRead.Vehicle data set high beam Read
DataRead.Vehicle data record offroad city light Read
DataRead.Vehicle data set LDC Binning Read
DataRead.MBC ECU Identification - Software Logical Block Part Number(s) Read
DataRead.MBC ECU Identification - Hardware Part Number Read
DataWrite.Vehicle data set active cornering light Write
DataWrite.Vehicle data set motorway light Write
DataWrite.Vehicle data set extended fog light Write
DataWrite.Vehicle data set high beam Write
DataWrite.Vehicle data record offroad city light Write
DataWrite.Vehicle data set LDC Binning Write

Test.Description: The CAN bus has a malfunction.
The CAN bus has a malfunction. Bus OFF
The left front level sensor has a malfunction. System Internal Failure
The left front level sensor has a malfunction. Sensor Supply Short To Ground
The left front level sensor has a malfunction. Sensor supply Short To Battery
The left front level sensor has a malfunction. Circuit Voltage Below Threshold
The left front level sensor has a malfunction. Circuit Voltage AboveThreshold
The left front level sensor has a malfunction. Signal Invalid
The left front level sensor has a malfunction. No Signal
The left rear level sensor has a malfunction. System Internal Failure
The left rear level sensor has a malfunction. Sensor supply Short To Ground
The left rear level sensor has a malfunction. Sensor supply Short To Battery
The left rear level sensor has a malfunction. Circuit Voltage Below Threshold
The left rear level sensor has a malfunction. Circuit Voltage Above Threshold
The left rear level sensor has a malfunction.Signal Invalid
The left rear level sensor has a malfunction. No Signal
Calibration of the vehicle level was not performed.
The manually set traffic type is implausible.
The output for the left front turn signal lamp has a malfunction.Component or System Operation Obstructed or Blocked
The output for the right front turn signal lamp has a malfunction. Component or System Operation Obstructed or Blocked
Control unit "LED driving lights actuation module" has a malfunction. System Internal Failure
Control unit "LED driving lights actuation module" has a malfunction. Circuit Open
Control unit "LED driving lights actuation module" has a malfunction.Circuit Voltage Out of Range

Control unit "LED driving lights actuation module" has a malfunction. Missing Message

The actuator motor for the headlamp range adjustment has a malfunction. Internal Electronic Failure
The actuator motor for the headlamp range adjustment has a malfunction.Over Temperature detected

The actuator motor for the headlamp range adjustment has a malfunction.Component or System Over Temperature

Temperature sensor 3 of control unit ''LED, driving lights actuation module'' has a malfunction.General Electrical Failure
The power supply is too low.
The power supply is too high.
Input ''Circuit 30'' has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Ground or Open

The power supply in the system is outside the permissible range.Circuit Voltage AboveThreshold
